purpose: Choose the best edit candidate before updating preview or final EDL.

next_shot.entry_strategy: white flash / whip cut into foot hit or hand hit

scoring_scale: 0-10, higher is better. bug_maskability means defects are mild or easy to hide; it is not bug severity.

criteria.music_alignment: Does the cut preserve the music phrase, build, beat, or drop placement?
criteria.story_completeness: Does the cut preserve the intended narrative beat?
criteria.handoff_energy: Does the cut push naturally into the next shot?
criteria.visual_continuity: Does subject direction, costume, space and motion continuity hold?
criteria.bug_maskability: Can defects be hidden by trim, flash, hard cut, crop or overlay without damaging the beat?
criteria.editability: Does this candidate leave useful handles for post-production?

known_issues: brief face turn near the end, can be masked by hard cut
candidates.reasoning: Best musical and narrative build, minor defect is maskable.
